title: Soul catcher
wikitext:
[]: Soul catcher?             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Apr 06, 2024 7:37 pm How did they capture Rei's soul? Did they use a core like one of them traps from Ghostbusters? Did they bust into Lilith's body and find a soul? Did they manage to capture quantum Rei out of thin air and take a piece out of her?

[]: Re: Soul catcher?             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Apr 07, 2024 11:47 am There's implications that the soul stays in the body after death, considering people explode into LCL when their soul is removed during Third Impact.

[]: Re: Soul catcher?             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sun Apr 07, 2024 3:06 pm AuraTwilight wrote: There's implications that the soul stays in the body after death, considering people explode into LCL when their soul is removed during Third Impact.

[]: Re: Soul catcher?             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Apr 08, 2024 6:37 am ...And? The soul stays in the body when they're sleeping, too.
